docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENFELD, SETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, GABRIEL $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,360.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,200.00 FILED BY ROSENFELD, SETH AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, GABRIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED SEP-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, GABRIEL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
